series_metadata.series_description: This report (T-8 form) contains detailed information about accidents involving school buses, including driver and vehicle particulars. Three major segments include how the school bus was physically involved, details of the loading/unloading zone, and an injury tally chart.

retention_rules.disposition: Electronic: Data is entered into the department computer system, retain for 5 years and then delete. ; Paper: Retain five years, then destroy., Electronic: Delete ; Paper: Shred
